case_title: S AND C MOTORS INC VS FLETCHER LIONEL

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FLETCHER LIONEL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY S AND C MOTORS INC AS TO DEFENDANT FLETCHER LIONEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-19-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF S AND C MOTORS INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLETCHER LIONEL $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,546.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FLETCHER LIONEL
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,729.50 AS TO DEFENDANT FLETCHER LIONEL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-19-1991, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO JUN-20-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT FLETCHER LIONEL
